basic_details.job_title: RGIPT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Superintendent and Technician Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT)
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT) Superintendent (Audit) and Technician (Fitter) Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website www.rgipt.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the RGIPT Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max Age: 35 years for both posts
age_limit.details: Superintendent (Audit): Maximum Age - 35 years. Technician (Fitter): Maximum Age - 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters' or Bachelors' degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounts for Superintendent (Audit); ITI Certificate in Fitter Trade for Technician (Fitter).
qualification.details: Superintendent (Audit): Masters' degree in Commerce / Finance/ Accounts with at least 55% marks and 3 years' relevant experience OR Bachelors' degree in Commerce/Finance/ Accounts with at least 55% marks with 5 years' relevant experience. Experience in Government Departments / Autonomous Bodies / PSUs / Reputed Institutions in Audit / Accounts / Finance. Technician (Fitter): ITI Certificate in Fitter Trade from a recognized Industrial Training Institute and Minimum 5 years of hands-on experience in fitting, assembly, maintenance and mechanical workshop operations.

salary_details.details: Superintendent (Audit): Rs. 50,000.00 per month consolidated Technician (Fitter): Rs. 40,000.00 per month consolidated

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGIPT Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGIPT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RGIPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the RGIPT Superintendent (Audit) and Technician (Fitter) posts is 31 May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline to be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for RGIPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the RGIPT Recruitment 2026. These are distributed between the Superintendent (Audit) and Technician (Fitter) positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Superintendent (Audit) post?
faq.answer: For the Superintendent (Audit) post, candidates need a Masters' or Bachelors' degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounts with specific marks and relevant experience as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Technician (Fitter) post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for the Technician (Fitter) post is an ITI Certificate in Fitter Trade from a recognized institute, along with a minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Superintendent (Audit) and Technician (Fitter) posts is 35 years. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these contractual positions ranges from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month. Specifically, Superintendent (Audit) gets Rs. 50,000 and Technician (Fitter) gets Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for RGIPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply online through the official website of RGIPT. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the RGIPT Recruitment 2026 will involve a Skill Test and/or a Personal Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for RGIPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for these posts.
